title: stevia glandulosa
intro: Stevia glandulosa, a species of the Stevia plant, is a type of herb that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stevia glandulosa include reducing blood pressure, improving blood sugar control, and providing relief from digestive issues. Stevia glandulosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed for their medicinal and health benefits.
